A_basic_context_identifiers.conversation_summary: The call involves Lyric from HERTZ contacting Sharon Ball to arrange a rental car through State Farm insurance. Initially, the rental pickup was set at HERTZ in Conyers, Georgia, but Sharon preferred to be closer to Morrow, Georgia, considering her vehicle drop-off at Rich One Stop Auto Repair on McDonald's Parkway. Sharon asked if she could be picked up from her vehicle drop-off location. Lyric found an alternative HERTZ location on Mount Zion Boulevard, Morrow. Due to timing constraints and preference, Sharon considered switching to Enterprise since HERTZ couldn't guarantee a pickup. Ultimately, Sharon requested the cancellation of the HERTZ reservation, which was processed by Lyric.

decision_points: confirming pickup availability at the location

C_time_feasibility.customer_stated_timing_need: Sharon planned to drop off her vehicle the next day around 5 PM.
C_time_feasibility.branch_hours_constraints: The latest available pickup from the alternative HERTZ location was 4 PM.
infeasibility_reasons: latest pickup conflicts with Sharon's schedule

customer_post_call_actions: possibly contact Enterprise for an alternative rental
K_outcome_customer_effort.effort_burden_explanation: The customer had to manage additional coordination with insurance and possibly another rental company due to location and timing issues.
